exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Primary compound for Push B, holding at 12kg. 4×10 clean = step to 14kg next Push B. Press fully overhead.

exercises.name: Incline DB Press
exercises.notes: Holding at 14kg. 3 clean sets before progressing. Upper chest focus, controlled eccentric.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.notes: Holding at 6kg. Lead with elbows, stop at shoulder height. If 3×15 lands clean, earn 7kg next Push B.

exercises.name: Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Holding at 24kg. Full stretch at bottom — long head emphasis. Lock in 3×12 here.

exercises.name: Triceps Pushdown
exercises.notes: Holding at 36kg. Elbows locked at sides, full extension at bottom. 3×12 clean = earn 38kg next week.
